topic: 《淘气小兔不憋尿大作战》：小巧圆润的淘气小兔一路蹦跳找厕所，用互动提示教会孩子听懂身体信号、及时如厕不硬扛。
script:
淘气小兔圆滚滚，小短腿一蹦一跳，薄荷绿背带短裤晃呀晃，橙色小围巾飞起来。它眨眼坏笑：“我还能再玩一会儿！”忽然，小兔大眼睛一亮一紧，粉鼻皱皱，门牙微露：“咦？肚肚在敲门！”

你来听听：是不是“嘀嘀、嘀嘀”的小信号？快用手轻轻按按小肚子，告诉小兔：“该找厕所啦！”

小兔一路弹跳：花丛里没有，树后也没有，长耳朵一高一低竖起来，眉毛上挑：“不憋！不硬扛！”它看到指路牌——“嘘嘘屋→”，立刻冲过去。

门口排队，小兔腿抖抖，深呼吸：“我先举手说：我要上厕所！”终于轮到它，小兔进门“哗啦啦”，呼——笑得更坏更甜。

回家路上，小兔得意地说：“身体说话要听懂，及时如厕最轻松！”你也跟着点点头，好吗？

pages.text: 《《淘气小兔不憋尿大作战》：小巧圆润的淘气小兔一路蹦跳找厕所，用互动提示教会孩子听懂身体信号、及时如厕不硬扛。》
pages.prompt:
儿童绘本封面，主题：《淘气小兔不憋尿大作战》：小巧圆润的淘气小兔一路蹦跳找厕所，用互动提示教会孩子听懂身体信号、及时如厕不硬扛。
画面比例 3:4
固定使用已保存角色资产作为视觉锚点。角色设定：物种/小兔；年龄感/4~6岁幼童；体态/小巧圆润、短四肢、弹跳感强；脸部特征/大眼睛高光、粉鼻、门牙微露、长耳一高一低；服装配色/薄荷绿背带短裤+奶油白T恤+橙色小围巾；表情气质/眨眼坏笑、眉毛上挑、活泼淘气但可爱；风格与禁用项/经典美式动画绘本质感、线条干净高饱和；禁用写实、恐怖阴暗、成人化身材、武器血腥、品牌Logo。
Style: Hand-painted watercolor children's picture book illustration. Texture: Visible paper fiber, mild pigment granulation, subtle brush pressure variation, slight edge bleed, natural stroke jitter. Palette: Soft warm palette with restrained saturation and low digital gloss.
构图变化标识：第 1 幅；封面主视觉
优先真实手绘感，避免过度锐化与数字涂抹感。
Avoid AI-looking artifacts: over-smooth surfaces, plastic skin, repeated micro-patterns, duplicated objects, warped fingers, fused edges, random gibberish text, logo, watermark. Prefer natural imperfections and human-made variation: tiny asymmetry, uneven pigment density, non-uniform outlines, realistic shadow falloff.

pages.text: 【开场】阳光明亮的草地上，淘气小兔圆滚滚一蹦一跳向前，薄荷绿背带短裤晃呀晃，橙色小围巾被风带起。它眨眼坏笑，对读者说：“我还能再玩一会儿！”
pages.prompt:
A cute toddler bunny (4-6 years old), small and round body, short limbs, strong bouncy motion, big eyes with bright highlights, pink nose, slightly visible front teeth, one long ear up and one ear down, wearing mint green suspender shorts, cream white T-shirt, and an orange scarf fluttering. Sunny grassy park, colorful flowers, classic American animated picture-book style, clean linework, high saturation, non-realistic. The bunny winks with a mischievous smile while hopping forward, speaking to camera. 4k, masterpiece, cinematic lighting, wide shot, low angle tracking pan, smooth motion, shallow depth of field, vibrant colors.

One ear up, one ear down, eyebrows raised with determination, saying 'Don’t hold it in!' (implied, no on-screen text required). Mint green suspender shorts, cream white T-shirt, orange scarf bouncing. Bright park colors, classic American animated picture-book style, clean line art, high saturation. 4k, cinematic lighting, medium shot, side tracking pan, quick subtle whip pans for peek actions, smooth animation, shallow depth of field.

Classic American animated picture-book aesthetic, clean lines, high saturation, cheerful daylight. 4k, masterpiece, cinematic lighting, wide shot, quick push-in to the sign then pull back to follow action, dynamic motion blur kept subtle, vibrant colors.

pages.prompt:
Medium shot outside a cute child-friendly restroom entrance, bright and clean. The same toddler bunny waits in line, legs trembling slightly, takes a deep breath, raises a paw as if politely announcing. Then the bunny quickly slips inside (no explicit bathroom content shown), we stay outside/at doorway; only playful sound-effect vibe implied visually (simple motion lines), then the bunny reappears/leans out relaxed with a sweet mischievous smile. Classic American animated picture-book style, clean linework, high saturation, warm lighting. 4k, cinematic lighting, medium shot, mostly locked-off camera with slight right dolly, gentle push-in on relieved facial expression, shallow depth of field.

characterBible.protagonist: 《淘气小兔不憋尿大作战》：小巧圆润的淘气小兔一路蹦跳找厕所，用互动提示教会孩子听懂身体信号、及时如厕不硬扛。

characterBible.consistencyPrompt: 固定使用已保存角色资产作为视觉锚点。角色设定：物种/小兔；年龄感/4~6岁幼童；体态/小巧圆润、短四肢、弹跳感强；脸部特征/大眼睛高光、粉鼻、门牙微露、长耳一高一低；服装配色/薄荷绿背带短裤+奶油白T恤+橙色小围巾；表情气质/眨眼坏笑、眉毛上挑、活泼淘气但可爱；风格与禁用项/经典美式动画绘本质感、线条干净高饱和；禁用写实、恐怖阴暗、成人化身材、武器血腥、品牌Logo。

qualityGate.summary: 发布包未通过基础质量门禁，建议补图或重跑失败页。

shots.description: 【开场】阳光明亮的草地上，淘气小兔圆滚滚一蹦一跳向前，薄荷绿背带短裤晃呀晃，橙色小围巾被风带起。它眨眼坏笑，对读者说：“我还能再玩一会儿！”
shots.cameraMovement: 低角度平移跟随，轻微手持感但稳定
shots.videoPrompt: A cute toddler bunny (4-6 years old), small and round body, short limbs, strong bouncy motion, big eyes with bright highlights, pink nose, slightly visible front teeth, one long ear up and one ear down, wearing mint green suspender shorts, cream white T-shirt, and an orange scarf fluttering. Sunny grassy park, colorful flowers, classic American animated picture-book style, clean linework, high saturation, non-realistic. The bunny winks with a mischievous smile while hopping forward, speaking to camera. 4k, masterpiece, cinematic lighting, wide shot, low angle tracking pan, smooth motion, shallow depth of field, vibrant colors.

shots.description: 【肚肚信号】小兔突然停住，眼睛一亮又一紧，粉鼻皱皱，门牙微露；它一手扶着小肚子，侧头认真听，画面用可爱符号表现“嘀嘀、嘀嘀”的小信号。旁白引导：快用手轻轻按按小肚子，告诉小兔：“该找厕所啦！”
shots.cameraMovement: 缓慢推近到面部与小肚子
shots.videoPrompt: Close-up of the same cute toddler bunny (4-6), round small body, big sparkling eyes, pink nose scrunching, tiny front teeth showing, one ear up one ear down. Mint green suspenders, cream T-shirt, orange scarf. The bunny pauses, places a paw on its belly, listening; cute cartoon on-screen symbols suggest 'beep beep' signals (no text logos). Bright cheerful daylight, classic American animation picture-book look, clean lines, high saturation. 4k, masterpiece, cinematic lighting, close-up, slow push-in, soft background blur, expressive facial animation.

shots.description: 【寻找厕所】小兔一路弹跳找厕所：先冲到花丛旁探头（没有），再蹦到大树后左右张望（也没有）。长耳一高一低竖得更明显，眉毛上挑，坚定地说：“不憋！不硬扛！”
shots.cameraMovement: 平移跟随+两次小幅快速摇镜配合探头动作
shots.videoPrompt: Medium shot: the same toddler bunny hops quickly between a flower bush and behind a tree, peeking left and right. One ear up, one ear down, eyebrows raised with determination, saying 'Don’t hold it in!' (implied, no on-screen text required). Mint green suspender shorts, cream white T-shirt, orange scarf bouncing. Bright park colors, classic American animated picture-book style, clean line art, high saturation. 4k, cinematic lighting, medium shot, side tracking pan, quick subtle whip pans for peek actions, smooth animation, shallow depth of field.

shots.description: 【看到指路牌】小兔停在小路口，抬头看到指路牌写着“嘘嘘屋→”。它眼睛放光，身体前倾准备冲刺，橙色围巾向后飘，立刻朝箭头方向飞奔弹跳。
shots.cameraMovement: 快速推拉结合：先推近指路牌再拉回跟随冲刺
shots.videoPrompt: Wide shot at a path intersection in a bright park. The same cute toddler bunny spots a simple wooden sign pointing right toward a restroom (child-friendly, no brands), eyes lighting up, leans forward then dashes/hops fast, scarf streaming backward. Classic American animated picture-book aesthetic, clean lines, high saturation, cheerful daylight. 4k, masterpiece, cinematic lighting, wide shot, quick push-in to the sign then pull back to follow action, dynamic motion blur kept subtle, vibrant colors.

shots.description: 【排队与上厕所】厕所门口排队，小兔在队尾腿抖抖，做深呼吸，举手认真说：“我要上厕所！”镜头切到轮到它：小兔冲进门内（不露骨、不尴尬），只用门外听到的“哗啦啦”拟声与它放松的表情来表现，随后它呼——露出更坏更甜的笑。
shots.cameraMovement: 固定机位+轻微向右平移，最后轻推近到放松表情
shots.videoPrompt: Medium shot outside a cute child-friendly restroom entrance, bright and clean. The same toddler bunny waits in line, legs trembling slightly, takes a deep breath, raises a paw as if politely announcing. Then the bunny quickly slips inside (no explicit bathroom content shown), we stay outside/at doorway; only playful sound-effect vibe implied visually (simple motion lines), then the bunny reappears/leans out relaxed with a sweet mischievous smile. Classic American animated picture-book style, clean linework, high saturation, warm lighting. 4k, cinematic lighting, medium shot, mostly locked-off camera with slight right dolly, gentle push-in on relieved facial expression, shallow depth of field.

shots.description: 【结尾回家】回家小路上夕阳暖光，小兔轻快弹跳，得意地对读者说：“身体说话要听懂，及时如厕最轻松！”它点点头，眨眼坏笑，邀请读者也跟着点点头。
shots.cameraMovement: 跟随式缓慢后退，保持小兔居中并留出前方道路
shots.videoPrompt: Wide shot on a cozy path heading home with warm sunset glow. The same cute toddler bunny (round small body, short limbs, bouncy hop, big shiny eyes, pink nose, tiny front teeth, one ear up one ear down) wearing mint green suspender shorts, cream white T-shirt, orange scarf. The bunny hops happily, nods, winks with a playful mischievous smile while addressing the viewer about listening to the body and going to the toilet in time. Classic American animated picture-book look, clean lines, high saturation, warm golden-hour cinematic lighting. 4k, masterpiece, wide shot, smooth tracking backward, gentle depth of field, vibrant colors.
